# GitLab Server Tools Test

env GOCOVERDIR=$WORK/covdata
mkdir $WORK/covdata

# Test get_project tool
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "get_project", "arguments": {"project_id": "123"}}}
EOF

stdout '"id": "123"'
stdout '"name": "Example Project"'
stdout '"default_branch": "main"'

# Test list_issues tool
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "list_issues", "arguments": {"project_id": "123", "state": "opened"}}}
EOF

stdout '"project_id": "123"'
stdout '"state": "opened"'
stdout '"issues"'

# Test create_issue tool
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "create_issue", "arguments": {"project_id": "123", "title": "Test Issue", "description": "A test issue", "labels": ["bug", "test"]}}}
EOF

stdout '"message": "Issue created successfully"'
stdout '"title": "Test Issue"'
stdout '"labels"'
